===Pokémon Adventures===
==== {{MangaArc|Scarlet & Violet}} ====
Eri and [[Mela]] first appeared in ''[[PASV09|Challenge! The Avant-Garde Gym Leader!!]]'', in a flashback to {{Scarlet}}'s time under [[Team Star]]'s care. While preparing to leave the base she was staying at, Scarlet received both a {{p|Charcadet}} and a set of [[Auspicious Armor]] from Mela as a token of friendship. Scarlet initially refused to take Mela's treasured armor, but eventually agreed after Eri and Mela's continued insistence.

She first appeared in person at the [[Caph Squad's Base]], where she tried greeting a supposed new Team Star recruit. The {{tc|Team Star Grunt}}s keeping guard of the tent refused Eri's request, claiming the recruit was tired from traveling all the way to their base. Eri accepted this and left, completely unaware the "recruit" was actually Scarlet, who had feigned being kidnapped in order to spy on a rogue faction of Grunts attempting to launch a coup and take over Team Star. Eri went up to her room, hoping to eat dinner and stream pro wrestling videos together with [[Carmen]]. Eri was soon visited by a pair of Grunts, who informed her that Carmen had been captured by the rebellious Grunts. They snuck into the area where Carmen was held and freed her. Carmen explained that she was kidnapped after coming across a Grunt's [[Rotom Phone]] that contained plans on the rebellion. Scarlet exited her room and had everyone look over the plans. Wanting the best for all members of Team Star, Eri decided to allow the coup to happen and devised a plan with everyone.

Later, the rebellious Grunts enacted their plan and launched a simultaneous attack on the Caph and [[Ruchbah Squad's Base|Ruchbah]] Squad's bases. The Grunts were left confused when Scarlet—disguised as {{Violet}}—raided the Caph Squad base as they were informed the actual Violet had only just arrived at the Ruchbah Squad base. Faking ignorance, Eri approached the Grunts and informed them she would fight to protect Team Star's home. Some of the rebellious Grunts accepted the coup as a failure and chose to follow Eri instead. Once Scarlet successfully completed the Star Barrage, she and Eri went to have their battle.
{{-}}
